summary: All 8 changes are implementable with no external blockers. Key gaps: (1) Cedar gate in fke-runtime is a list comparison — needs forge-policy Pep injection; (2) Kiln BGW missing entirely — direct port of agui_hook_dispatcher; (3) wasi:http dispatch is stubbed — needs WIT file + wasmtime-wasi-http wiring; stubs in sign-did/cosign and all 3 store crates are pure todo!(). Optimal execution: c001→c002 sequentially, c003–c008 in parallel.
